_meta.notes: T2 admin building at its slot cap: exactly 2 active strategies. All inactive strategies are soft-blocked (cap is full) and appear under Available with 'Deactivate the running strategy first' hint. No Locked section because reputation is high enough to afford everything.

strategies.all.title: Aggressive Negotiations
strategies.all.activateBlockedReason: The Administration Facility cannot support more than 2 active strategies at this level
strategies.all.effect: Effects: * -1.5% Funds Off on Launch Costs and R&D Purchases. * -0.05% Funds Off on Facility Repair and Construction.

strategies.all.title: Open Source Tech
strategies.all.description: Share technologies with research institutes in exchange for science.
strategies.all.activateBlockedReason: The Administration Facility cannot support more than 2 active strategies at this level
strategies.all.effect: Effects: * Converts 5% of Funds earned into Science points.

strategies.all.title: Fundraising Campaign
strategies.all.description: Reach out to the public for monetary donations.
strategies.all.activateBlockedReason: The Administration Facility cannot support more than 2 active strategies at this level
